rationale.D1: No `*IO` interfaces for mechanisms (grep confirmed zero); hardware-welded SubsystemBase subclasses own motors directly (Flywheels, Hood, IntakePivot, Spindexer), with only CTRE-generated CommandSwerveDrivetrain as a vendored swerve abstraction — confirmed D1=2.
rationale.D2: No Superstructure coordinator, no WantedState/SystemState FSM, no RobotManager; confirmed coordination is command composition in Controls.java with button bindings and inline switch on IntakeMode enum — solid D1-style command-based, not a real coordinator.
rationale.D3: Confirmed WPILib physics sims used in-subsystem (FlywheelSim in FlywheelsSim.java, SingleJointedArmSim in HoodSim.java and PivotSim.java, FlywheelSim in Spindexer.java), plus PhotonVision VisionSystemSim via SimWrapper for vision — covers drivetrain and multiple mechanisms but no maple-sim; D3=2.5.
rationale.D4: One real JUnit test file (AutosTest.java) with a meaningful assertFalse verifying auto path files exist on disk; CI runs `simulateJavaDebug -PautomatedTest=true` (a sim smoke test) but does NOT run `gradle test` directly — partial CI testing without full assertion coverage.
rationale.D5: CTRE SignalLogger.start() is called (DriveStateSignalLogger) and writes drive telemetry to .hoot log files; LauncherSubsystem uses NetworkTables publishers systematically; VisionSubsystem publishes structured NT entries; no AdvantageKit/DogLog/Epilogue — confirmed structured NT + CTRE signal logging, D5=2.
rationale.D6: 86 PathPlanner path files confirmed deployed and consumed via AutoBuilder.buildAuto/followPath in AutoLogic.java and AutoPath.java; Choreo vendordep is present and 1 traj file exists (NewPath_copy1.traj) but zero Choreo imports in Java code — choreo discounted, D6=2.
rationale.D7: Confirmed three-Limelight MegaTag2 + MegaTag1 fusion with tuned std-dev matrices, ambiguity/range/velocity/rotation/spread rejection logic, and `drivetrain.addVisionMeasurement` with timestamped FPGA-corrected poses in VisionSubsystem.java — photon-sim for vision in sim; no TimeInterpolatableBuffer or dedicated RobotState class, so D7=3.
rationale.D8: GitHub Actions CI confirmed (spotless format check + automated sim test on push/PR); AdvantageScope layout committed; two robot variant configs (Alpha vs Comp TunerConstants); build.gradle has spotless 6.25; no README beyond WPILib-License.md, no lib repo — CI + variant structure earns D8=2.5.
